languages.text: {n}Вы понимаете, что слова юноши имеют смысл. Как бы вам ни хотелось дышать одним воздухом с чернью, только вы вправе беспрепятственно отключить от питания любое устройство внутри селения. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы понимаете, что слова юноши имеют смысл. Как бы вам ни хотелось дышать одним воздухом с чернью, только вы вправе беспрепятственно отключить от питания любое устройство внутри селения. {/n}

languages.text: {n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы понимаете, что слова юноши имеют смысл. Как бы вам ни хотелось дышать одним воздухом с чернью, только вы вправе беспрепятственно отключить от питания любое устройство внутри селения. {/n}

{n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Las palabras del joven tienen sentido. Por mucho que te desagrade abusar de tus derechos, solo tú tienes autoridad para desconectar cualquier dispositivo del asentamiento. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las palabras del joven tienen sentido. Por mucho que te desagrade abusar de tus derechos, solo tú tienes autoridad para desconectar cualquier dispositivo del asentamiento. {/n}

languages.text: {n}你发觉那年轻人的话确有道理。尽管你未必喜欢在平民面前摆出这副高高在上的架子，可这定居点内，也唯有你一人，有权切断任何设备的能源。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你发觉那年轻人的话确有道理。尽管你未必喜欢在平民面前摆出这副高高在上的架子，可这定居点内，也唯有你一人，有权切断任何设备的能源。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ce que dit le jeune homme est vrai. Bien que l'idée de vous mêler au bas peuple vous répugne, vous {mf|seul|seule} avez le droit de désactiver les machines de la colonie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ce que dit le jeune homme est vrai. Bien que l'idée de vous mêler au bas peuple vous répugne, vous {mf|seul|seule} avez le droit de désactiver les machines de la colonie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genç adamın sözlerindeki mantığı görüyorsun. Sıradan insanlara hükmetmekten ne kadar hoşlanmasan da yerleşimdeki herhangi bir cihazın bağlantısını kesme hakkına yalnızca sen sahipsin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Genç adamın sözlerindeki mantığı görüyorsun. Sıradan insanlara hükmetmekten ne kadar hoşlanmasan da yerleşimdeki herhangi bir cihazın bağlantısını kesme hakkına yalnızca sen sahipsin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du erkennst den Sinn in den Worten des jungen Mannes. Es mag dir noch so sehr missfallen, einfache Leute herumzukommandieren, aber du allein hast das Recht, jedes Gerät im Inneren der Siedlung abzuschalten. {/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You see the sense in the young man's words. As much as you might dislike lording it over the common people, you alone have the right to disconnect any device inside the settlement. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du erkennst den Sinn in den Worten des jungen Mannes. Es mag dir noch so sehr missfallen, einfache Leute herumzukommandieren, aber du allein hast das Recht, jedes Gerät im Inneren der Siedlung abzuschalten. {/n}

languages.text: {n}その若者の言葉に意味を見出す。庶民を支配する権利は嫌でも、この集落内の機器を切断する権利は君だけだ。{/n}
